creator: danny@clari.net.au
text:
Sorry, I should have been more clear.

sysutils/froxlor port lists mysql as a PHP extension dependency when this is not true.
The software does not use php-mysql, but it does use php-pdo_mysql.  This is true even for php5.6 installations.

sysutils/froxlor/Makefile should be updated to not depend on a false dependency.
